home.subtitle: Signalni ko'ring — imkon qadar tez bosing. Har millisekund hisobga kiradi.
home.noStatsYet: Hali statistika yo'q. Birinchi o'yinni boshlang!
home.step1Desc: "O'ynash" tugmasini bosing va ekranga tayyor turing
home.step2Desc: Doira to'q binafsha rangda — hali bosmang
home.step3Desc: Doira yashil rangga aylanganda darhol bosing
home.question: Bugun nima o‘ynaymiz?

game.prepareDesc: Doira yashil rangga aylanganda ekranni bosing
game.tooSoonDesc: Signal chiqishidan oldin bosdingiz. Yashil rangni kuting.

share.title: Musobaqaga chaqiring
share.message: Mening reaksiya vaqtim {{time}} ms. Meni yenga olasizmi?

errors.generic: Nimadir xato ketdi. Qayta urinib ko'ring.

profile.title: Profil
profile.deleteConfirm: Profil va unga tegishli barcha ma’lumotlar o‘chirilsinmi?

reaction.title: Reaksiya
reaction.instructions:
Signalni kuting va darhol bosing.

Har bir raundni aniq bajaring. Tez va to‘g‘ri javob yakuniy millisekund natijasini yaxshilaydi.
